# Resource Entry Template

Use this template when adding new resources to the SOC Knowledge Hub. All entries should be structured to ensure consistency and usability.

---

### **[Title of Resource]**
* **Category:** [e.g., Detection Engineering]
* **Type:** [e.g., Framework / Guide / Tool / Blog]
* **Summary:** [A brief description of what the resource is.]
* **Why it matters:** [How it helps a SOC analyst or manager.]
* **Best for:** [e.g., L1, L2, Detection Engineer, SOC Manager]
* **Difficulty:** [Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced]
* **Scope:** [Vendor-neutral / Vendor-specific]
* **Trust Level:** [High / Medium / Low]
* **Last Validated:** [YYYY-MM]
* **Link:** [The full URL to the resource]

---

### Example Entry

### **MITRE ATT&CK Getting Started**
* **Category:** Detection Engineering
* **Type:** Framework / Guide
* **Summary:** Introductory material for analysts and detection engineers to understand ATT&CK structure and use.
* **Why it matters:** Helps teams map detections and adversary behavior consistently.
* **Best for:** L1, L2, Detection Engineer, Threat Hunter
* **Difficulty:** Beginner to Intermediate
* **Scope:** Vendor-neutral
* **Trust Level:** High
* **Last Validated:** 2026-03
* **Link:** https://attack.mitre.org/resources/getting-started/
